workout.title: Today's Workout
workout.noProgramDesc: No workout program assigned yet. Contact your coach.
workout.completedDesc: Great work! You crushed today's session.
workout.missedDesc: Missed today. Get back on track tomorrow!
workout.readyDesc: Your session is ready. Let's go!

feedback.title: Coach Feedback
feedback.empty: No feedback notes from your coach yet.

checkIn.title: Weekly Check-In
checkIn.subtitle: Submit your weekly stats and progress photos so your coach can adjust your targets.
checkIn.step1Desc: Please enter your current body measurements. Weight is required.
checkIn.step2Desc: Select Front, Side, and Back photos in consistent lighting to track visual composition changes.
checkIn.successDesc: Your coach has been notified and will review your stats and photos shortly. Check back for custom feedback and adjustments.
checkIn.step3Desc: Please review your inputs before submitting. Once submitted, your coach will be notified.

feedback.title: Coach Feedback & Reviews
feedback.subtitle: Track your notes, instructions, and weekly check-in reviews.
feedback.empty: No feedback notes or reviews from your coach yet.
feedback.errorDesc: Something went wrong while fetching your feedback history.
feedback.reviewedSubtitle: Your coach has reviewed your weekly progress and left notes for you.
feedback.viewFullHistoryNote: You can view all past check-ins and notes in your feedback history.

mealLogger.title: Meal Logger
mealLogger.removePlanMealConfirm: Remove this entire plan meal and all of its items?
mealLogger.planMealRemoved: Plan meal removed from your diary.

nutritionPlan.addDescription: Choose when you ate this option and adjust the number of servings.
nutritionPlan.addedToDiary: Plan meal added to your diary.
nutritionPlan.addFailed: Could not add this plan meal to your diary.
nutritionPlan.alreadyCompleted: Another option from this meal block is already in your diary for this date.
nutritionPlan.notDiaryReady: Coach must link items and use supported units

workoutLogger.title: Workout Logger
workoutLogger.noProgramDesc: Your coach hasn't assigned a workout program yet. Reach out to your coach to get started!
workoutLogger.restDayDesc: Recovery is where gains are made. Rest up and come back stronger tomorrow!
workoutLogger.failedLoad: Failed to load today's workout. Please try again.
workoutLogger.confirmCompleteDesc: Are you sure you want to mark today's workout as complete?

supplementsTracker.title: Supplements Tracker
supplementsTracker.sub: Daily supplement checklist — resets at midnight
supplementsTracker.noSuppsDesc: Your coach hasn't assigned any supplements yet. Check back later!

recipeLibrary.emptyCustom: No custom recipes yet. Create your first recipe!

addFoodModal.emptyFood: Type at least 1 character to search our master food database.
addFoodModal.emptyRecipe: No recipes found matching your query.
